summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord RP Game Master bot. All new GM engine features working correctly including campaign generation, character questions, relationships, opening scenes, message-driven responses with German output and dice rolls, and character change tracking. Frontend dashboard, character creation with tabbed form, and all navigation working perfectly.
passed_tests: POST /api/campaigns creates campaign with auto_create_channels field
POST /api/gm/generate-campaign creates rich German campaign from prompt
POST /api/gm/message-driven responds in German with dice rolls when appropriate
POST /api/gm/message-driven returns null when no response needed
Frontend: Dashboard loads with campaign stats and recent events
Frontend: Characters page - create character with tabbed form (Basics, Personality, World, GM Only)
Frontend: Character creation end-to-end workflow functional
Frontend: All sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Campaigns, Characters, NPCs, Lore, Rules, Channels, Event Log)
Frontend: Event Log shows character_change events in German
Integration: All LLM-powered GM features produce German output
Integration: Character change tracking from GM responses to Event Log display
All existing campaign/NPC/lore/rules/channel APIs still functional
